name: conduit-monorepo
description: Conduit / Axiom monorepo — shared UI + gateway client packages and the Axiom Admin console.

scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace @conduit/gateway-client && npm run build --workspace @conduit/ui
scripts.typecheck:packages: npm run typecheck --workspace @conduit/gateway-client && npm run typecheck --workspace @conduit/ui
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:admin
